text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...How'd this end up here? Ah... there's<n>another
one...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's feathers everywhere... If the<n>others see,
they'll find out I'm keeping<n>Mambo here—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gyah?! Trainer! H-h-how long have you<n>been
there?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You heard nothing! You will forget<n>everything
you just heard. In fact, who's<n>Mambo? You
certainly don't know!
